title: Hotjar Survey Response
description: A single response to a Hotjar survey, containing the answers provided by a respondent along with optional comments and tags.

id.description: The unique identifier for the survey response.

answers.description: The list of answers provided by the respondent.

comment.description: An optional comment provided by the respondent.

tags.description: Tags associated with this survey response for categorization.

SurveyAnswer.description: An individual answer to a survey question.

question_id.description: The unique identifier of the question being answered.

answer.description: The text of the answer provided by the respondent.

SurveyResponseTag.description: A tag associated with a survey response.
